arts.ttl: 'Unfortunately': Mikel Arteta now says £30m Arsenal player will be out 'for a few more weeks'
Football transfer rumours: Arsenal lead Man Utd in Sesko race; Liverpool want 3 Leverkusen players
arts.sum: Real Madrid are planning to strengthen their defence next summer with two free transfers - Trent Alexander-Arnold from Liverpool and Alphonso Davies from Bayern Munich . Another defender Real Madrid want to sign is Nottingham Forest centre-back Murillo, with Barcelona and Bayern Munich also interested.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends Arsenal's defensive tactics against Man City - claiming he would have been 'very thick' not to sit deep with 10-men
arts.sum: Arteta defended his tactics, referring to Arsenal's 5-0 defeat to Manchester City in 2021 when former captain Granit Xhaka was sent off.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon insists Gunners' 'dark arts' should be CELEBRATED after Man City draw
arts.sum: Arsenal have come in for criticism for the way they set about defending their lead against Manchester City but not everyone is opposed the the approach from Mikel Arteta's team

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to accusations Arsenal used ‘dark arts’ against Manchester City
arts.sum: The Arsenal manager says his team learnt from past encounters with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Report: What Leandro Trossard told his Arsenal teammates in the dressing room after being sent off vs Man City
arts.sum: Refereeing decisions were once again at the centre of the conversation this weekend as Arsenal played Manchester City. The Gunners came away from the Etihad...

arts.ttl: Merson Says: Man City now fully aware of threat posed by Arsenal
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Paul Merson is back with his latest column, reflecting on Man City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal and the threat the Gunners now pose to the Premier League champions...

arts.ttl: BREAKING - Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury absences in huge update before Bolton clash - football.london
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed a number of Arsenal players will be absent through injury before the Carabao Cup clash against Bolton at Emirates Stadium. Martin Odegaard and Mikel Merino were both notable absentees from Sunday's draw against Manchester City with Arteta handed a number of new worries from the clash at Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: ‘Would be Arsenal’s best player’: Robbie Savage says £63m Man City player is better than anyone at Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal drew with Manchester City at the weekend, and, from the outside looking in, you’d say that’s a great result for the Gunners. Indeed, you...

arts.ttl: Arsenal rival Chelsea and Real Madrid in wonderkid race
arts.sum: Arsenal have joined the race to sign Franco Mastantuono, according to a report. Arsenal rival Chelsea and Real Madrid in wonderkid race
